word: H8377 - תְּאֹו - tᵉʼôw - teh-o' - Wild bull

sections.paragraph:
Original: תּוא תּאו

Transliteration: te'ô tô'

Phonetic: teh-o'

BDB Definition:

  1. wild ox, antelope, oryx
    1. perhaps an extinct animal, exact meaning unknown

Origin: from H8376

TWOT entry: 2488

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
